name: CROSS_TOP_TARGETPAIRS_BY_FUNCTION
description: Top target pairs for a functional category.
cypher:
MATCH (f:Functional_of_Target {name:$function})<-[:FUNCTIONED_AS]-(t:Target)<-[:HAS_TARGET]-(tp:TargetPair)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)
RETURN tp.name AS target_pair, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count
ORDER BY patent_count DESC, target_pair
LIMIT 10;

examples: 某功能类别下高频靶点对有哪些？
